deviations.description: The process model only requires asking the patient about pain every 20 minutes when local anesthesia is administered and the patient has high anesthesia tolerance. It does not require administering additional anesthesia every 20 minutes as mandated by Version 2. This results in a direct violation of the new, stricter requirement.

The process model does not include the activity 'administer additional anesthesia' at 20-minute intervals for patients with high anesthesia tolerance who received local anesthesia. This omission fails to satisfy the new obligation introduced in Version 2.
